boxes.label: algorithm
boxes.text:
nput: Learning rate ηm, smoothing parameter µm, compressor Cm for m  {0, 1, ...M }.
utput: Parameter wm for m  {0, 1, ..M }.
: Initialize model parameter wm for all participants m  {0, 1, ..M }
: while not convergent do
when a client m is activated, do:
Randomly select a sample xm,i
Compute and send Cm (hm(wm; xm,i)) to server
Receive Co(∆m,i) from the server (in a listen manner)
Compute  hm,i fi (w0, Φi) via Avg-RandGradEst (Eq. 2)
Compute  wm hm (wm; xm,i) via backpropagation.
Compute vm =  hm, i fi (ω0, Φi) · wm hm,i
Update wm ← Wm − ηmVm
when server receives from client m, do:
Compute δ
i and group into ∆m,i
Send Co(∆m,i) to the client m
Compute v0 = wo fi(w0, Φi), (FOO)
Update W0 ← W0 − N0V0
